hydrogen_radial_equation.name: Hydrogen Atom Radial Equation (reduced)
hydrogen_radial_equation.description: Radial Schrodinger equation for hydrogen-like atoms. Set equal to zero.
hydrogen_radial_equation.search_text: Hydrogen atom radial equation Schrodinger Coulomb potential Laguerre polynomials radial wavefunction nuclear charge Z hydrogen-like

hydrogen_energy_levels.name: Hydrogen Atom Energy Levels
hydrogen_energy_levels.description: E_n = -m_e e^4 / (2 hbar^2) * 1/n^2 = -13.6 eV / n^2 for hydrogen. Principal quantum number n = 1, 2, 3, ...
hydrogen_energy_levels.search_text: Hydrogen energy levels Bohr model Rydberg formula 13.6 eV principal quantum number n spectrum Lyman Balmer Paschen series ionization

bohr_radius.name: Bohr Radius
bohr_radius.description: a_0 = hbar^2 / (m_e * e^2) in Gaussian units, approximately 0.529 Angstroms. Characteristic length scale of hydrogen atom.
bohr_radius.search_text: Bohr radius atomic length scale hydrogen ground state size 0.529 Angstrom characteristic distance orbital a naught a_0

rydberg_formula.name: Rydberg Formula
rydberg_formula.description: 1/lambda = R_inf * (1/n1^2 - 1/n2^2), gives the wavenumber of spectral lines in hydrogen. R_inf is the Rydberg constant.
rydberg_formula.search_text: Rydberg formula spectral lines hydrogen spectrum wavenumber wavelength Lyman Balmer Paschen Brackett series transition Rydberg constant
